author: Rohit Kapoor
content: Pranalyse completely changed the way I work out at home. The real-time posture corrections and 3D feedback make me feel like I have a personal trainer in my phone!

author: Rahul Mehta
content: As someone with back pain from long desk hours, Pranalyse helped me fix my posture safely. The instant feedback and daily desk exercises are a game changer.

author: Anita Verma
content: I love how Pranalyse connects everything together. It feels like a complete wellness platform, not just another fitness app.

author: Arjun
content: This is perfect for beginners like me. I used to follow random workout videos, but now I know if I’m doing the exercises correctly.

author: Meera Thomar
content: Pranalyse makes fitness simple and intelligent. No wearables, no confusion—just clear guidance, habit tracking, and real progress I can see and feel.

author: Sneha
content: I love how Pranalyse connects my workouts with diet recommendations. It doesn’t just track activity—it actually guides me to move and live better.

author: Rahul Sharma
content: As someone who sits at a desk all day, the quick desk exercises and posture analysis are incredibly helpful. My back pain has already improved.
